classes.name: RedisRateLimiter
classes.docstring: Redis-based rate limiter for distributed environments.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize rate limiter.

Args:
    rate_limit: Maximum number of requests per window
    window_seconds: Window size in seconds

methods.name: is_rate_limited
methods.docstring:
Check if a key is rate limited.

Args:
    key: Identifier for rate limiting (e.g., IP address)
    
Returns:
    True if rate limit exceeded, False otherwise

classes.name: ErrorHandlingMiddleware
classes.docstring: Middleware to catch and properly format unhandled exceptions.

functions.name: rate_limit
functions.docstring:
Rate limiting dependency.

Args:
    request: FastAPI request
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If rate limit exceeded

functions.name: verify_api_key
functions.docstring:
Verify API key and return user info.

Args:
    api_key: API key from request header
    
Returns:
    User info dictionary
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If API key is invalid

functions.name: optional_api_key
functions.docstring:
Optionally verify API key without requiring it.

Args:
    api_key: API key from request header
    
Returns:
    User info dictionary if valid, None otherwise

functions.name: require_admin
functions.docstring:
Require admin privileges.

Args:
    user_info: User info from API key verification
    
Raises:
    HTTPException: If user is not an admin
